Home / Project Management & Kanban / Plane

Plane — open source alternative

Open source JIRA alternative with cycles and modules.

Strengths

  • Modern UI inspired by Linear/Jira.
  • Cycles, modules and views.
  • Active community and rapid updates.

Weaknesses

  • Still adding features at pace — occasional rough edges.
  • Self-hosted setup involves several services.
  • Fewer integrations than mature incumbents.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Plane is used as an alternative to

Asana

Project and task management for teams.

Monday.com

ClickUp

One-app-to-replace-them-all workspace for tasks, docs and goals.

See all alternatives →

Linear

Streamlined issue tracking built for software teams.

See all alternatives →
